title: Gerascanthus lasiocalyx
taxonomy:
Gerascanthus lasiocalyx is classified within the family Ebenaceae. 
This plant is a species within the genus Gerascanthus. 
The family Ebenaceae is a part of the order Malpighiales. 
The order Malpighiales is a part of the clade Rosids, which is further categorized into the superorder Rosanae. 
The superorder Rosanae is a part of the class Magnoliopsida within the kingdom Plantae.

intro: Gerascanthus lasiocalyx, also known as Lasiocalyx, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the staff vine family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce symptoms of various ailments such as fever, cough, and sore throat.
